title: sphyrospermum muscicola
intro: Sphyrospermum muscicola is a species of flowering plant in the family Balsamaceae, commonly known as the mountain balsam or musk balsam. The medicinal properties of Sphyrospermum muscicola include its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and expectorant properties, which have been traditionally used to treat respiratory issues such as coughs and bronchitis. The health benefits of the plant include its ability to reduce inflammation, alleviate congestion, and promote relaxation, making it a popular remedy for colds and flu. Sphyrospermum muscicola is often prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or infused oil to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
